nasb.text: This is the third time I am coming to you. Every fact is to be confirmed by the testimony of two or three witnesses.

esv.text: This is the third time I am coming to you. Every charge must be established by the evidence of two or three witnesses.

cnv.text: 這是我第三次到你們那裡去，各樣事情必須憑兩三個證人的口，才能確定。

ccb.text: 这是我第三次要去你们那里。圣经上说：“任何控告必须有两三个证人作证才能成立。”

csbs.text: 这是我第三次到你们那里去。“任何事，凭两个或三个见证人的口，才能成立。”
